codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the core cross-cutting requirements: hidden categories are filtered across public category endpoints and breadcrumb rendering no longer exposes hidden categories; responsive public layout introduces mobile navigation and stacked content/sidebar behavior; XSS rendering relies on React escaping with coverage in new tests. One non-blocking breadcrumb edge case remains.

issues.description: Breadcrumb traversal stops when the immediate parent is hidden (`if (!parent) break` after filtering parent by `cat_display='yes'`). In hierarchies like visible-grandparent -> hidden-parent -> visible-child, this drops visible higher ancestors instead of skipping only hidden nodes.

summary: PASS with one non-blocking issue: breadcrumb traversal truncates when a hidden parent exists, which can omit visible higher ancestors. No blocking correctness, security, or regression defects were found for the required feature behavior.
